escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts including Iran naval blockade forcing 78 ships to reroute, Israeli strikes killing senior Hamas commander, and continued Israeli-Hezbollah violence despite ceasefire extension.

ticker_items: Iran blockade forces 78 commercial ships to change course - CENTCOM
Senior Hamas military chief Al-Haddad killed in Israeli Gaza strike
Israel strikes 20+ Lebanese villages, 110 paramedics killed - MSF
Oil prices surge to $4.39/gallon amid supply disruptions
Israel-Lebanon agree 45-day ceasefire extension after talks

eastern_europe.description: Russian missile strike on apartment building kills 24 including 3 children.

middle_east.description: Israeli strikes continue despite ceasefire extension agreement.
Israeli airstrike killed Hamas armed wing chief Ezzedine Al-Haddad described as key architect of October 7 attacks
Israeli strikes targeted more than 20 villages with evacuation warnings issued for nine villages

middle_east.text: Xi agrees Iran must open Hormuz strait
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: U.S. President

middle_east.text: Tehran is consulting with Oman to establish a suitable mechanism for managing the Strait of Hormuz
middle_east.speaker: Abbas Araqchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Minister

observers.description: Xi Jinping met with Trump in Beijing discussing Iran crisis and Strait of Hormuz blockade. Putin scheduled to visit China May 19-20 immediately following Trump's departure, highlighting complex diplomatic balancing.

Turkey proposes $1.2 billion military fuel pipeline to eastern NATO allies amid regional energy security concerns. The proposal aims to support NATO's eastern flank during ongoing Middle East conflicts.

Trump returned from China trip calling it 'tremendous success' while CENTCOM reports Iranian blockade forcing commercial shipping disruptions. House Republicans signal no new Ukraine supplemental likely, backing more Russia sanctions instead.

Deepening Arctic defense ties with Nordic nations to reduce reliance on US for defense. Move comes as Trump threats and increased Russian-Chinese Arctic military activities prompt security realignment.

financial.notes: Oil prices surged from $2.98 to $4.39 with economist warning weeks to avoid recession as supply lines choked.

update_log.text: CENTCOM reports 78 commercial ships forced to change course due to Iranian naval blockade
Israel confirms killing of Hamas armed wing chief Al-Haddad in Gaza airstrike
MSF reports 110 Lebanese paramedics killed in 163 direct Israeli attacks
Israel-Lebanon agree to 45-day ceasefire extension after productive talks
Trump returns from China trip praising historic diplomatic moment
Iran announces plan to unveil Strait of Hormuz toll system amid ongoing blockade.
Trump concludes China visit claiming Xi agreement on Iran opening Hormuz strait.
Israel and Lebanon agree to 45-day ceasefire extension despite continued strikes.
